case_title: CONSULTING ASSOCIATES OF CALIFORNIA VS. CALVIN WOMBLE et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONSULTING ASSOCIATES OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WOMBLE, CALVIN DBA THE ELLINGTON GROUP DOES 1-100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-10-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-11-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-26-2007
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-10-2007 CONTINUED TO NOV-02-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-20-2008 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). FEB-20-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-19-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-02-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-19-2007 CONTINUED TO FEB-20-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). DEC-19-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONSULTING ASSOCIATES OF CALIFORNIA
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SERVE BY PUBLICATION
